title: OG Ores: Reborn
description: Bringing back the old ore textures for maximum nostalgia.
body:
# OG Ores: Reborn

OG Ores: Reborn is a resource pack to replace my old project (OG Ores) with replacements for all the ore textures. Normal ores have the pre 1.17 textures, and deepslate ores are made to be as similar as possible. The textures are ripped directly from a 1.12.2 instance (it was the only old version I had installed lmao).

 

This resource pack uses 16x textures, but I may make higher resolution versions in future.

 

I'm open to any suggestions and helpful criticism in the comments. What can I do better? What have I done well? Let me know in the comments!
## 
## Credits:

Mojang for the original textures.
